features.title: Embeddable Widget
features.description: A single script tag drops a fully functional HeadyBot chat widget onto any webpage. Customize appearance, position, greeting, and behavior — no engineering team required. Works on any CMS, static site, or web app.

features.title: Multi-Platform (Slack/Discord/Teams/Web)
features.description: Deploy the same HeadyBot instance to your website, Slack workspace, Discord server, and Microsoft Teams channel — all simultaneously. One configuration, one conversation history, every platform your team uses.

features.title: Context Memory
features.description: HeadyBot remembers every user's conversation history, preferences, and context across sessions and platforms. When a user returns — whether it's tomorrow or next month — the bot picks up exactly where they left off.

features.title: Custom Personas
features.description: Configure HeadyBot's personality, tone, name, and knowledge base to match your brand. Choose from Heady's 7 animal cognitive archetypes or define a fully custom persona with your own system prompt and guardrails.

features.title: Live Handoff
features.description: When a conversation exceeds HeadyBot's capabilities or a user requests human support, the bot gracefully hands off the full conversation transcript to a live agent — with zero context loss and no user frustration.

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Track conversation volume, resolution rates, escalation frequency, topic clustering, user satisfaction scores, and bot performance metrics — all in a real-time analytics dashboard designed for support and operations teams.

features.title: No-Code Builder
features.description: Build, configure, and deploy HeadyBot without writing a single line of code. The visual builder lets anyone create custom flows, set up knowledge base integrations, configure personas, and manage platform deployments.

features.title: Enterprise SSO
features.description: HeadyBot integrates with your enterprise identity provider through SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0. Deploy for your entire organization with role-based access, audit logging, and SOC 2-compliant security controls.
